LanguageData.FPS_EmptyTankDesc: Completely empty the tank of all toner and ingredients.
LanguageData.FPS_TankSpoiled: {0} spoiled and lost all stored toner.
LanguageData.FPS_PrinterSettingsDesc: Choose which food categories this printer may produce.
LanguageData.FPS_PrinterUnavailableOutput: No printable meal is currently available.
LanguageData.FPS_SettingsPasteCostDesc: How much toner a printer consumes to produce one nutrient paste meal.
LanguageData.FPS_SettingsSimpleCostDesc: How much toner a printer consumes to produce one simple meal.
LanguageData.FPS_SettingsFineCostDesc: How much toner a printer consumes to produce one fine meal.
LanguageData.FPS_SettingsLavishCostDesc: How much toner a printer consumes to produce one lavish meal.
LanguageData.FPS_SettingsFeederOutputDesc: Maximum number of feed meals an animal feeder will keep stocked at once.
LanguageData.FPS_SettingsSmallTankCapacityDesc: Maximum toner stored by a small toner tank.
LanguageData.FPS_SettingsMediumTankCapacityDesc: Maximum toner stored by a medium toner tank.
LanguageData.FPS_SettingsLargeTankCapacityDesc: Maximum toner stored by a large toner tank.
LanguageData.FPS_SettingsDisintegratorIdlePowerDesc: Power draw of a food disintegrator while it is powered but not processing food.
LanguageData.FPS_SettingsDisintegratorActivePowerDesc: Power draw of a food disintegrator while it is actively converting food into toner.
LanguageData.FPS_SettingsSmallTankPowerDesc: Power draw of a small toner tank while it is operating.
LanguageData.FPS_SettingsMediumTankPowerDesc: Power draw of a medium toner tank while it is operating.
LanguageData.FPS_SettingsLargeTankPowerDesc: Power draw of a large toner tank while it is operating.
LanguageData.FPS_SettingsPrinterPowerDesc: Power draw of a food printer while it is powered.
LanguageData.FPS_SettingsFeederPowerDesc: Power draw of an animal feeder while it is powered.
LanguageData.FPS_SettingsBedsideFeederCost: Bedside feeder toner cost per meal
LanguageData.FPS_SettingsBedsideFeederCostDesc: How much toner the bedside feeder consumes each time it serves one meal.
LanguageData.FPS_SettingsRandomizationDesc: Allow printers to choose randomly between currently valid meal variants instead of always using the same output.
LanguageData.FPS_SettingsDebugLogDesc: Write Food Printer debug messages to the RimWorld log, even when RimWorld Dev Mode is off.
LanguageData.FPS_SettingsHardCheckFoodTypeDesc: When enabled, pawns will refuse printers whose connected toner ingredients do not match their current meat or human-meat food preferences.
LanguageData.FPS_DeconstructPipesDesc: Mark only placed food pipes for deconstruction. This ignores walls, machines, and other non-pipe buildings even if they share pipe visuals.
LanguageData.FPS_PipeDuplicateSpawnBlocked: {0} could not be installed because {1} already provides pipe infrastructure there.
LanguageData.FPS_MustPlaceAtBedHead: Must be placed at the head of a bed.
